response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and additional expertise in Kotlin/Java. His roles at re:cinq and Optilyz show direct relevance to internal enterprise tooling and automation. Proven leadership in architecture, testing (TDD, Vitest), and cloud technologies (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) is evident. While his recent AI-agent work adds unique value, his focus on user needs and cross-functional collaboration aligns well with the role's requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (6+ years) with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB
Strong backend and DevOps skills, including Kubernetes, Docker, and AWS CDK
Proven track record in architecture, testing (TDD), and performance optimization
concerns: Limited explicit experience with Nest.js (primary stack) in resume, though Node.js proficiency suggests adaptability
No direct mention of Vitest (testing framework) in recent roles
German language skills are basic, which may impact collaboration in a Berlin-based team
